statement:
장쇄 PFAS의 능동-운반체 강화 인자(2-풀에서 측정 root를 재현하는 Vmax 배수)는 사슬길이
n_C의 매끄러운 로그선형 함수여서 QSPR로 예측 가능하다 (선형 적합 R^2 > 0.9이면 예측적,
미만이면 ad-hoc).

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: The carrier-enhancement factor is NOT a smooth log-linear function of chain length (R^2 0.70 on n_C, 0.62 on K_PL; both <0.9): essentially no enhancement is needed to C10, then a steep onset at C11-C12. So the long-chain active-carrier enhancement is NOT cleanly QSPR-able -- it stays a longest-chain-specific (ad-hoc) lever, not a chain-length-predictable one. Hypothesis refuted.
